reviews.review_title: Fast, Hypnotic, and Pure VR Reflex Fun!
reviews.review_description:
Infinifly takes a simple concept and pushes it to an engaging, almost hypnotic level. You face waves of moving walls with only one or two gaps to pass through — and your mission is simple: survive. It’s a brilliant throwback to Space Harrier on the Sega, but now fully realized in VR.

The controls are sharp and responsive, allowing precise movement as the speed ramps up and your reflexes are truly put to the test. It quickly becomes that kind of “zone game” — where you stop thinking and just flow through the chaos.

As an Early Access title, Infinifly already shows immense promise, and future updates could easily add new strategies, mechanics, and challenges. A solid and mesmerizing creation from Raven’s Rose, who also gave us an excellent VR Paddle game.

⚡ Addictive, precise, and surprisingly meditative — a fun one for arcade fans.
